overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a futuristic open-world game (Cyberpunk 2077), showing a character walking through a sunlit urban street during golden hour. The character moves from a shaded sidewalk past vending machines, crosses a multi-lane road, and continues along a palm-lined boulevard toward a large stadium structure with long shadows cast across the pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with commercial vending machines

events.description: emerges from building shadow into direct golden hour sunlight
passes colorful automated vending machines lining the left side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, passing pedestrians and vending machines while moving toward the sunlit intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red dress standing near the vending machines

entered.detail: massive dark geometric building with industrial construction cranes on the roof
tall yellow cranes mounted on top of the industrial building
tall black modern street lamp with rectangular light fixture
colorful automated vending stalls with bright advertisements and neon accents
tall cylindrical tower with illuminated '04' digital display

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in shadow under an overhead structure, then emerges into bright golden hour sunlight. The character walks along a concrete sidewalk passing colorful vending machines on the left, with a massive dark industrial building and construction cranes dominating the right side. Long shadows stretch across the pavement as pedestrians walk in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian crosswalk on multi-lane arterial road

events.description: steps off the sidewalk onto the asphalt crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street
vintage-style brown car passes by on the left side of the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane street from one sidewalk to the other, navigating between passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: vintage brown sedan driving past the crosswalk from left to right
pedestrian in dark clothing crossing the street ahead of the character

entered.detail: low-rise beige industrial building with green-tinted windows and flat roof

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the sidewalk onto a wide asphalt crosswalk, moving through open space with full sky visibility. A vintage car passes by on the left as the character crosses toward the opposite side, with an industrial warehouse building coming into view on the left and the digital billboard tower receding into the distance on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide palm-lined boulevard leading to stadium complex

events.description: reaches the opposite sidewalk lined with tall palm trees in planters
passing bus stop benches and digital advertisement screens along the boulevard

agents.ego_description: walking along the spacious palm-lined sidewalk toward the large stadium structure, passing groups of pedestrians and futuristic vehicles on the adjacent road

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians walking ahead in the same direction toward the stadium

entered.detail: massive circular stadium with industrial scaffolding and tiered seating visible in the distance
tall palm trees planted in rectangular concrete planters lining both sides of the boulevard
metal bench with integrated digital advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics
vertical digital screen showing advertisements near the bus stop

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide, sunlit boulevard flanked by tall palm trees in planters, with the massive stadium structure dominating the horizon ahead. The sidewalk features modern bus stop benches with digital advertisements. Groups of pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction, while futuristic cars drive along the multi-lane road to the right. The golden hour lighting creates long shadows from the palm trees across the pavement as the character approaches the stadium complex.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded industrial corridor into a wide, sun-drenched urban boulevard. It begins in the shadow of an overhead structure before emerging into bright golden hour sunlight, passing colorful vending machines and towering construction cranes. As the character moves forward, the scene opens up onto a wide asphalt crosswalk where a vintage car passes by and the surrounding industrial warehouses shift in perspective. The camera then follows the character onto a palm-lined boulevard, where the lighting creates long, rhythmic shadows across the pavement and digital advertisements line the sidewalk. Finally, the view expands toward the horizon, tracking the character as they move past futuristic traffic toward a massive stadium complex dominating the skyline.
